swap_suggestion.problem: July = low season. Rough seas may cancel island tours.
swap_suggestion.alternative: If island tour cancelled: VinWonders full day (rain-proof)

swap_suggestion.verdict: Keep Phu Quoc — VinWonders is an excellent rain backup. Island tour runs if wind < 20km/h.

day_backups.label: Hanoi AM → Sapa PM

backup_plan.name: Indoor cafe crawl (fog/rain)
backup_plan.note: The Hill Station, Leopard Cat Cafe — mountain views from inside

swap_suggestion.problem: July = peak fog season. Visibility near zero after 2PM. Fansipan summit often in clouds.
swap_suggestion.alternative: Stay extra day in Hanoi — day trip to Ninh Binh (Trang An boat ride, rain or shine)
swap_suggestion.alternative2: Swap Sapa days for Phong Nha caves (indoor cave tours, weather-proof)
swap_suggestion.cost_impact: Bus to Ninh Binh ₹600 vs Sapa bus ₹1,050. Save ₹450
swap_suggestion.verdict: Keep Sapa — but use backup indoor activities. Fog is part of the experience. Only swap if 3+ consecutive days show >80% rain.

day_backups.recommendation: ⚠️ High weather risk (96% rain, 1h fog). Keep original plan but prepare to switch to indoor alternatives. Best window: 06:00-08:00.

day_backups.label: Day Trip — Highest Risk Day

backup_plan.name: Ceramic Mural + Long Bien Bridge walk
Old Quarter food crawl (covered)
backup_plan.note: Bun Cha, pho, egg coffee — all indoor seating

swap_suggestion.problem: Highest risk day. Cruises cancel if wind > 25km/h or typhoon warning.
swap_suggestion.alternative: Ninh Binh — 'Halong Bay on land' (boat ride through limestone karsts, rain or shine)
swap_suggestion.alternative2: Hanoi full museum day + Train Street + water puppet
swap_suggestion.cost_impact: Ninh Binh tour ₹1,200 vs Halong cruise ₹2,000. Save ₹800
swap_suggestion.verdict: Check windy.com 3 days before. If wind > 25km/h or storm warning → switch to Ninh Binh immediately.

day_backups.recommendation: ⚠️ High weather risk (73% rain, 0h fog). Keep original plan but prepare to switch to indoor alternatives. Best window: 06:00-07:00.

info.name: Phong Nha
info.why: UNDERGROUND ADVENTURE. World's largest caves. Zipline into Dark Cave + mud bath inside. Kayak underground rivers. Jungle trekking. PERFECT rain backup.
highlights: Dark Cave (₹1,400) — zipline in + mud bath + kayak OUT

info.name: Quy Nhon
info.why: Hidden adventure beach. Ky Co Beach boat trip (snorkeling + cliff jumping). Eo Gio cliff walk + rock climbing. No crowds. Half price of Nha Trang.
highlights: Ky Co Beach (₹350 boat) — snorkel + cliff jump + pristine

info.name: Da Nang
info.why: Action central. Ba Na Hills cable car (5km) + Golden Bridge. Marble Mountains (caves + climbing). My Khe Beach (watersports). Dragon Bridge fire show.
highlights: Ba Na Hills + Golden Bridge (₹1,400) — cable car + French village + fantasy park

info.name: Nha Trang
info.why: Adventure beach city. VinWonders (bigger than Phu Quoc). Island snorkeling + scuba diving. Mud baths. Parasailing. Best nightlife.
highlights: VinWonders Nha Trang (₹2,800) — bigger than Phu Quoc version

info.name: Mui Ne
info.why: Desert adventure by the sea. Sand dune jeep tours. Kite surfing capital of Asia. ATV riding on dunes. Fairy Stream trek. Cheapest watersports.
highlights: White Sand Dunes jeep + ATV tour (₹1,200) — sunrise
Kite surfing lesson (₹1,500/2hr) — best spot in Asia

info.name: Dalat
info.why: Mountain adventure like Sapa but DRIER. Alpine coaster (2km downhill track). Canyoning down waterfalls. Zipline across pine valleys. Cool weather 18-22°C.
highlights: Canyoning (₹1,500) — rappel down 3 waterfalls + cliff jump
Pongour Falls (₹35) — biggest waterfall in area

info.name: Con Dao
info.why: Paradise islands + diving. Best snorkeling/diving in Vietnam. Sea turtle nesting in July (night beach watch!). Speedboat island hopping. Hidden coves.
highlights: Scuba diving (₹3,500) — coral reefs + turtles + rays
Sea turtle nesting night watch (July season!)
Bay Canh Island kayak + jungle trek

info.name: Ha Giang
info.why: ULTIMATE motorbike adventure. Ha Giang Loop — 3 days on mountain roads. Ma Pi Leng Pass (best view in SE Asia). Less fog than Sapa. Raw, wild, no tourist traps.
highlights: Ha Giang Loop 3-day motorbike (₹2,000 rental + guide)
Ma Pi Leng Pass — most spectacular road in Vietnam
Sleep in Hmong villages — authentic homestays

info.name: Cat Ba Island
info.why: Island adventure — Lan Ha Bay kayaking (untouched Halong), rock climbing on limestone cliffs, jungle trekking, Monkey Island. Cheaper + less crowded than Halong Bay.
highlights: Lan Ha Bay kayak tour (₹1,200) — 100x less crowded than Halong
Deep water solo rock climbing (₹1,500) — climb limestone cliffs over water
Cat Ba National Park jungle trek (₹70)

swap_recommendations.cost_impact: Flight to Phong Nha instead of Sapa bus. Similar cost ₹1,500-2,500.
swap_recommendations.reasoning: Sapa avg rain: 96%. Phong Nha avg rain: 50%. Phong Nha is 46% drier during your trip.
swap_recommendations.what_you_get: UNDERGROUND ADVENTURE. World's largest caves. Zipline into Dark Cave + mud bath inside. Kayak underground rivers. Jungle trekking. PERFECT rain backup.
highlights: Dark Cave (₹1,400) — zipline in + mud bath + kayak OUT

swap_recommendations.cost_impact: Flight to Quy Nhon instead of Phu Quoc. Similar cost ₹1,500-2,500.
swap_recommendations.reasoning: Phu Quoc avg rain: 94%. Quy Nhon avg rain: 56%. Quy Nhon is 38% drier.
swap_recommendations.what_you_get: Hidden adventure beach. Ky Co Beach boat trip (snorkeling + cliff jumping). Eo Gio cliff walk + rock climbing. No crowds. Half price of Nha Trang.
highlights: Ky Co Beach (₹350 boat) — snorkel + cliff jump + pristine

reorder_suggestion.current_order: HCMC → Phu Quoc → Hanoi → Sapa → Hanoi
reorder_suggestion.issue: Both Phu Quoc (monsoon) and Sapa (fog season) are in the WETTEST period. Central Vietnam is drier in July.
reorder_suggestion.suggested_reorder: HCMC (2 days) → Da Nang/Hoi An (3 days, DRIEST) → Hanoi (2 days) → Sapa (2 days) → Hanoi departure
reorder_suggestion.why: Central Vietnam (Da Nang/Hoi An) has the BEST weather in July. By going there during Jun 30-Jul 3 (instead of Phu Quoc), you get the driest window.
reorder_suggestion.cost_impact: Same number of flights. Da Nang flights ₹1,500-2,500 (same as Phu Quoc). Hoi An is cheaper than Phu Quoc (₹1,000/day vs ₹1,500/day).
reorder_suggestion.what_you_lose: VinWonders Phu Quoc, 4-island tour, cable car
reorder_suggestion.what_you_gain: Ba Na Hills Golden Bridge, Hoi An ancient town, My Khe Beach, Cao Lau noodles, tailor shopping — ALL in better weather

summary: 12 high-risk days, 2 city swaps suggested, 14 cities compared
source: Weather forecast analysis + alternative city weather comparison
